name: Forrest Barnwell-Hagemeyer
subject: what Ted Cruz said about Dr. Manny
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
It’s humbling. It’s flattering. And it’s challenging.
[](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkdduuud-olhhkyhhid-y/)

---|---|---
| Friend, Over just the past few weeks, Dr. Manny has won endorsements from Senator Rand Paul, Mark Levin, Jim DeMint - and, now, from Senator Ted Cruz. **Senator Cruz says it well: the establishment’s only chance to beat Manny Sethi is to fool conservatives into voting for their candidate.** Here’s what Senator Cruz said about the attacks on Dr. Manny: _**"...Too many times the Washington swamp tries to trick voters into choosing their preferred candidate.**_ _**_**We need conservative fighters in the U.S. Senate that will stand up for our values and that is why I’m endorsing Dr. Manny Sethi for United States Senate.**_**_ _**_**_**Dr. Manny is a pro-life doctor who will fight to finally repeal Obamacare, defend the 2nd Amendment, and help get our economy moving again.**_**_**_ _**_**_**_**There's a reason the Establishment's throwing everything they’ve got at Dr. Manny these final days—he’s winning. I am urging Tennessee conservatives to stand up to the attacks, join me, and stand with Manny Sethi."**_**_**_**_ Senator Cruz hits the nail on the head. We need to get this message out to Tennessee conservatives. [STAND WITH TED CRUZ: DONATE NOW](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkdduuud-olhhkyhhid-j/) Thank you for your support,
Forrest Barnwell-Hagemeyer, Campaign Manager

name: Biden 2020
subject: No regrets, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Time is running out to make sure that history doesn't repeat itself. |
---
"I wish I had done more."

Peter, that's the feeling that many of us woke up with on the morning after Donald Trump's election. It's a deep pain we still feel to this day -- and now, time is running out to make sure that history doesn't repeat itself.

We simply can't afford four more years of Trump's failed leadership. We need to keep doing everything we can to elect Joe Biden to unite this nation and lead us forward.

name: Steve Chabot
subject: ICYMI: Paycheck Protection Program Shows Widespread Local Impact
body:
I am proud to say the Paycheck Protection Program I helped craft has saved hundreds of thousands of jobs in our communities. You don’t have to take my
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jkdhiiiy-kujkulhluu-d/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkdhiiiy-kujkulhluu-r/) Supporter,I am proud to say the Paycheck Protection Program I helped craft has saved hundreds of thousands of jobs in our communities. You don't have to take my word for it - check out this story from Local 12 on the huge impact this bipartisan program is having locally for hardworking Ohio families and small businesses.-Steve Chabot **WKRC Local 12****: ****Paycheck Protection Data Shows Widespread Impact Locally, Could Be More on Way** James PilcherJuly 24, 2020[https://local12.com/news/local/paycheck-protection-data-shows-widespread-impact-locally-could-be-more-on-way](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkdhiiiy-kujkulhluu-y/)READING (WKRC) - Gregg DeVita started Midwest Embroidery here back in 2014, building it into a business worth about a half-million dollars annually, and he was about to have a banner year.Then the pandemic hit.**He says without a loan of less than $100,000 from Congress ' Paycheck Protection Program, he might not have made it and his workers would have been on unemployment.**"It shows you what can be done when there is a unified purpose," DeVita said. Under the $700 billion program, the loans can be forgivable and were to be used to help keep workers on the payroll - although rules were changed to allow for other expenses.Congress is close to another round of coronavirus stimulus money that could include an extension of the PPP program.***** **A study by researchers at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology released this week found that the PPP program may have been one of the most effective of any of the coronavirus stimulus package.** The study concluded that the payroll loans may have kept unemployment rates from rising by as much as three percentage points.***** **U.S. Rep. Steve Chabot, R-Westwood, is the ranking minority member for the House small business committee, and his district received more money than any other in Ohio. On Thursday, he introduced a bill that would guide $20 billion of remaining PPP money to businesses with 10 or fewer workers.** Chabot said the fact that Congress did so much so quickly is a near miracle, and that he hopes any next round would include as much or more transparency into who is getting what money."Transparency is important," Chabot said. "After all these are taxpayer dollars. And I think people have a right to know where their money is going." ### | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkdhiiiy-kujkulhluu-j/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkdhiiiy-kujkulhluu-t/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkdhiiiy-kujkulhluu-i/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254

Supporter,I am proud to say the Paycheck Protection Program I helped craft has saved hundreds of thousands of jobs in our communities. You don't have to take my word for it - check out this story from Local 12 on the huge impact this bipartisan program is having locally for hardworking Ohio families and small businesses.-Steve Chabot WKRC Local 12: Paycheck Protection Data Shows Widespread Impact Locally, Could Be More on Way James PilcherJuly 24, 2020 (WKRC) - Gregg DeVita started Midwest Embroidery here back in 2014, building it into a business worth about a half-million dollars annually, and he was about to have a banner year.Then the pandemic hit.He says without a loan of less than $100,000 from Congress ' Paycheck Protection Program, he might not have made it and his workers would have been on unemployment."It shows you what can be done when there is a unified purpose," DeVita said. Under the $700 billion program, the loans can be forgivable and were to be used to help keep workers on the payroll - although rules were changed to allow for other expenses.Congress is close to another round of coronavirus stimulus money that could include an extension of the PPP program.*** A study by researchers at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology released this week found that the PPP program may have been one of the most effective of any of the coronavirus stimulus package. The study concluded that the payroll loans may have kept unemployment rates from rising by as much as three percentage points.* U.S. Rep. Steve Chabot, R-Westwood, is the ranking minority member for the House small business committee, and his district received more money than any other in Ohio. On Thursday, he introduced a bill that would guide $20 billion of remaining PPP money to businesses with 10 or fewer workers.** Chabot said the fact that Congress did so much so quickly is a near miracle, and that he hopes any next round would include as much or more transparency into who is getting what money."Transparency is important," Chabot said. "After all these are taxpayer dollars. And I think people have a right to know where their money is going." ### | | | ---|---|--- Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254

name: Terry Neese
subject: and away we go…
body:
Dear Friend,Big news: we just launched our new TV ad this morning -- check it out below! [](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdhkyc-elutjhyju-r/) With only 32 days until the runoff election, your support is needed more than ever. [Would you be able to chip in $25, $100, $500, or more right now?](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdhkyc-elutjhyju-y/)Our campaign has the momentum we need to WIN - but I am not taking a single vote for granted. We need to talk to every voter in the district before election day on August 25th - but I need your help to do it.My campaign team set an aggressive fundraising goal of $5,000.00 to raise before the end of the day. Every dollar we raise will help us keep our new ad on the air so voters know I am the candidate who will help President Trump get Americans back to work. [HELP US HIT OUR GOAL!](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdhkyc-elutjhyju-j/) We cannot afford another two years of Kendra Horn and Nancy Pelosi. We need a job creator in Congress, someone who has the record of growing a business and building our economy.I'm the candidate who will get the job done -- and with your support we will get America back on track! [P.S. -- Can you chip in $50 or more right now to keep our new ad on the air?](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdhkyc-elutjhyju-t/) [Unsubscribe](https://terryneese.cmail19.com/t/t-u-pdhkyc-elutjhyju-i/)

body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013spQcT7yzNqR2Rsfm7jmYjNUTt4R70RdAjVWHUJxPJN3zh0_poVWNPIsCNC4HCX2Nn-ty4BlBHzMmwzkZxabwpyjaGbTF6RgT8JzsU3FIInjePO9IV-Cmh1Nhn56Vqq4oht7d1RD3cj5RFX0BzKpAY7nHayu-G_lIuRl3G8q3C_xoHQB09gYAg==&c=3akiTZiWJrDD6ZijsvUpWOPKFoKa8yIzpmHGFewMhNrM_CMcLP2b_w==&ch=VCQ1p34PG_OwbuAvkwYk8X7r31vNJCtiUTQxsoeO8_4xU7PTq-8pGQ==)
---
| Patriot,
The COVID-19 pandemic has given the Democrats an opportunity to trample all over our rights. They have used the crisis as a power-grab to implement their socialist policies and silence their opponents.
One of their biggest targets: Americans who want to practice their faith.
We shouldn't need to remind the Democrats that freedom of religion is protected by the first amendment. And if they actually left their liberal bubbles in D.C. and the coasts, they would know that WORSHIP IS ESSENTIAL to the lives of millions of Americans.
---

They have used the crisis as a power-grab to implement their socialist policies and silence their opponents. One of their biggest targets: Americans who want to practice their faith. We shouldn't need to remind the Democrats that freedom of religion is protected by the first amendment. And if they actually left their liberal bubbles in D.C. and the coasts, they would know that WORSHIP IS ESSENTIAL to the lives of millions of Americans. | | | == | No government body can tell any American citizen when they can or can't practice their religion. disclaimer_text: paid for by big drug companies, and now they’re flooding PA-10 with dark money to send him back to Congress
body:

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18400890/227280014/1543981737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGJmMWZkYS04YWNlLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BTTdGGzCUQkVTEgsvL-lgiuhYQBcMfj_xAw3TiGX30c=&emci=afbf1fda-8ace-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=b0bf1fda-8ace-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
| | Hey, just wanted to make sure you saw this message from **U.S. Senator Cory Booker** last week. Cory made history in 2013 when he was elected the first Black senator from New Jersey. He understands the importance of building more Black representation in the Senate, and he knows Mike Espy is the leader who can usher in new leadership and progress for Mississippi. [**If you can, join Cory in supporting Mike Espy for Senate by pitching in $10 or more before our upcoming July fundraising deadline >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18400891/227280015/1981194159?refcode=em-200725-cb-lift&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGJmMWZkYS04YWNlLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BTTdGGzCUQkVTEgsvL-lgiuhYQBcMfj_xAw3TiGX30c=) | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18400892/227280016/1981194159?refcode=em-200725-cb-lift&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGJmMWZkYS04YWNlLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BTTdGGzCUQkVTEgsvL-lgiuhYQBcMfj_xAw3TiGX30c=)

Hi,
I’m Cory Booker, U.S. Senator from New Jersey. I want to take a moment to talk about why I support Mike Espy in his race to become Mississippi’s next senator, and why I think you should too.
Mike is a trailblazer and lifelong public servant who made history when he became the first Black U.S. congressman from Mississippi since the Reconstruction era, as well as the first and only Black U.S. secretary of agriculture in our nation’s history.**Now, he’s working to make history again by becoming Mississippi’s first Black U.S. senator since Reconstruction.**
It can be shocking to realize that in the year 2020, _only 10_ African-Americans have served in the Senate in our country’s history – I myself was New Jersey’s very first Black senator when I was elected in 2013. And Mississippi, which has the highest percentage Black population of any state, has gone more than 100 years without Black leadership in the halls of the U.S. Senate.
In this very special and important moment right now, across our country people — especially young people of color — are demanding change. Just look at the nationwide calls for criminal justice reform, and the amazing victory Mississippians saw last month when they finally removed the hateful and divisive confederate battle emblem from their state flag.
**Mississippi, like our country as a whole, is changing.** And we need new leaders in the U.S. Senate who are ready and willing to change along with it for the better.
I know Mike will be a fighter in the U.S. Senate for affordable health care, public education, economic opportunity, and justice for each and every one of us if he wins this November. And by refusing any Super PAC money, he’s counting on grassroots contributions from folks like you to do it.
**Help make history and flip the U.S. Senate this November: Chip in $10 or whatever you can to support Mike Espy’s people-powered campaign today.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | | | Hey, just wanted to make sure you saw this message from U.S. Senator Cory Booker last week. Cory made history in 2013 when he was elected the first Black senator from New Jersey. He understands the importance of building more Black representation in the Senate, and he knows Mike Espy is the leader who can usher in new leadership and progress for Mississippi. = | = Hi, I’m Cory Booker, U.S. Senator from New Jersey. I want to take a moment to talk about why I support Mike Espy in his race to become Mississippi’s next senator, and why I think you should too. Mike is a trailblazer and lifelong public servant who made history when he became the first Black U.S. congressman from Mississippi since the Reconstruction era, as well as the first and only Black U.S. secretary of agriculture in our nation’s history.Now, he’s working to make history again by becoming Mississippi’s first Black U.S. senator since Reconstruction. It can be shocking to realize that in the year 2020, only 10 African-Americans have served in the Senate in our country’s history – I myself was New Jersey’s very first Black senator when I was elected in 2013. And Mississippi, which has the highest percentage Black population of any state, has gone more than 100 years without Black leadership in the halls of the U.S. Senate. In this very special and important moment right now, across our country people — especially young people of color — are demanding change. Just look at the nationwide calls for criminal justice reform, and the amazing victory Mississippians saw last month when they finally removed the hateful and divisive confederate battle emblem from their state flag. Mississippi, like our country as a whole, is changing. And we need new leaders in the U.S. Senate who are ready and willing to change along with it for the better. I know Mike will be a fighter in the U.S. Senate for affordable health care, public education, economic opportunity, and justice for each and every one of us if he wins this November. And by refusing any Super PAC money, he’s counting on grassroots contributions from folks like you to do it. Help make history and flip the U.S. Senate this November: Chip in $10 or whatever you can to support Mike Espy’s people-powered campaign today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = – Cory Booker Paid for by Mike Espy for U.S. Senate Mike Espy for U.S. Senate 4450 Old Canton Rd, Suite 205 Jackson, MS 39211 United States

name: MJ Hegar Finance Team
subject: Follow the money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
A campaign's donations can tell you a lot about where the candidate's priorities are.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ec8/7f51f7bc/405820e4/4ef64da8/2367117954/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ec8/7f51f7bc/405820e4/4ef64daf/2367117954/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffb?refcode=email_202007225.1nd__1759__&amount=10")
---
MJ likes to say that if you don't understand why a politician is voting against the interests of their constituents, all you've got to do is follow the money.

If you follow Sen. Cornyn's money, you find the insurance industry, Big Pharma, the gun lobby, private detention centers, and the Koch network. If you follow MJ's money, what you find are her grassroots donors. That's 56,000 of you from more than 190 Texas counties, joining together to power this campaign.

She's going to be a senator for the people of Texas, not corporate PACs or special interests. We can fight back against Sen. Cornyn's big money donors and elect a senator who will fight for ALL Texans, but we're going to need your help. **Can MJ count on you?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

body:
Hey, there! 👋

As of today, we're officially 101 days out from November 3rd, 2020. That means we have 101 days to convince the folks of CA-38 that we need to keep Linda right where she belongs -- in Congress.

This year has placed our country under unprecedented strain, making this election one of the most consequential in recent memory. Let's make sure we elect empathetic, experienced, and forward-thinking leaders, like Linda.

If you're ready to join Team Sánchez, make a donation to Linda's re-election campaign today >>

Thank you,

-- Team Sánchez

name: Greg Stanton
subject: 101 More Days, Then We Vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend,

We are now only 101 days until Election Day. That's 101 days until we decide who will lead our country and state during one of the most interesting and challenging times our nation has ever before experienced.

**[Will you join us in making a contribution so that Democrats in Arizona and across the country can get us back on track by providing health care, sustainable jobs, and stability in Washington to all Americans?](https://act.myngp.com/el/crcaEXJlmOHevAzrR_YsX2pamjtPn2lh4YspabWVTy8=/VpgxfbtkQeZiEbDa3cE-T4nP2hq4odotL5o_YAwee9U=?refcode=X_072020_100Days_C)**

Together, we can ensure that we have people in Washington and Arizona who care about access to reliable and sustainable jobs, clean air and water, and access to health care for all American families. With your help today, we can get a little closer to creating the America we all want to live in.

name: Rachel Maddow Show (via Blue Georgia)
subject: WAKE-UP CALL for Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
With Republicans playing dirty, we have to fight TWICE as hard and raise TWICE as many resources to win.
| | |
---
**- Rachel Maddow on voter suppression in Georgia -
"IT IS A WAKE-UP CALL FOR WHAT IS COMING IN NOVEMBER AND WHAT REPUBLICANS ARE GOING TO TRY TO DO."**
|
---
|
---
Team, Rachel Maddow is 100% right: The voter suppression in Georgia's primary election was not an accident - it was the latest example of Republicans trying to buy this election and cling to power.
The GOP will do _whatever it takes_ to win - including suppressing our right to vote - and there's simply too much at stake to let them get away with it:

**Right now polling shows Reverend Raphael Warnock (D) and unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R) NECK AND NECK in Georgia's toss-up race - which _The Washington Post_ says is key to deciding Senate control!**
With Republicans playing dirty, we have to fight TWICE as hard and raise TWICE as many resources to win. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can flip this seat and take back the Senate, but we can't do it without grassroots support.

name: Team Joe
subject: $15 million next week alone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
more than we spent in the last five weeks combined |
---
Peter --

We have some exciting news: after putting our first ads on the air a few weeks ago, we're starting to dramatically ramp up our advertising next week!

**In fact, the $15 million we'll be spending on ads in the _next week alone_ is more than we spent in the _last five weeks combined._**

Peter, we're running these ads on TV, online, over the radio, and more in battleground states that Donald Trump won in 2016 -- including Arizona, Florida, Michigan, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin.

This is an incredible investment towards winning in November, and we wouldn't have been able to do this in the first place without grassroots supporters like you. But right now, we can't be sure the momentum will hold.

To keep these ads up, we need more first-time donors to dig deep and chip in now and make sure we can keep up this level of advertising every day between now and Election Day.

**We're still 60,000 donations from the goal we set for our 100 days out milestone. After Sunday, we only have 100 days to win this thing, so it's critical that we reach our goal and keep our ads up.**

Peter, can you make your first $5 donation today to help us reach our 100 Days Goal and keep up our advertising momentum? | **Supporter Record for[Peter Willis](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.25_B1_newads_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.25_B1_newads_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1")**

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

subject: ICYMI: Vice President Pence Back Home Again in Indiana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
President Trump and Vice President Pence have delivered huge results for Indiana during this pandemic | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/icymi-vice-president-pence-back-home-again-in-indiana?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=09d3d7d0ea&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republicans,

Vice President Pence was Back Home Again in Indiana yesterday, praising the decisive actions Governor Holcomb has taken to lead Indiana through the COVID-19 pandemic and leading a roundtable with education leaders.

**“Governor, I want everyone in this state to know the President and I and our entire team fully support your leadership and the steps you’ve taken in Indiana to keep this state on the right track.” –Vice President Mike Pence**

---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0aa470b778&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [WATCH – Vice President Pence: "Wearing a Mask...is How We Keep Indiana Open"](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a23cf1cae2&e=1acd9bb3d6 "WATCH – Vice President Pence: "Wearing a Mask...is How We Keep Indiana Open"")
---
| President Trump, Vice President Pence and their team have been invaluable partners to Governor Holcomb as he leads the state through the COVID-19 Pandemic. Under President Trump’s leadership, the Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) has provided Indiana with:
* $55.5 million in federal support
* 1.5 million N95 respirators
* 860,534 gloves
* 187,793 face shields
* 440,683 surgical masks
* 110 ventilators
* 43,300 swabs and 30,900 units of media for testing

President Trump and Vice President Pence have also delivered huge results for Indiana during this pandemic through the CARES Act and the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP):
* The CARES Act is providing up to $2.6 billion in aid to Indiana.
* The PPP has provided more than $9.4 billion in loans to nearly 79,000 Indiana businesses.
* The third round of PPP is protecting 1 million Indiana jobs.
* More than 3.2 million Hoosiers have received Economic Impact Payments, totaling over $5.7 billion in aid.

Additionally, Vice President Pence led an education roundtable with Governor Holcomb, United States Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos, and other education leaders at Marian University. The panel discussed the need for schools to safely reopen to in-person instruction this fall and the actions the government is taking to ensure this is done.

The Vice President had a full day in the Hoosier state, with his first stop being an event supporting our attorney general nominee, Todd Rokita.

It's always a thrill to welcome Vice President Mike Pence and Second Lady Karen Pence back home again to Indiana. They continue to serve our nation with honor, humility and grace. We couldn’t be prouder of how they represent Indiana on the global stage.

-Indiana Republican Party

---
| [SHARE – Video of Vice President Pence in Indiana!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bd74ce6ff1&e=1acd9bb3d6 "SHARE – Video of Vice President Pence in Indiana!")

name: Team Warner
subject: weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| |
| If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbb4/53d9897e/546a42a0/1c8858ca/2652210990/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Derek --

We hope this email finds you and your loved ones safe and healthy. Team Warner will keep sending these weekly updates to keep folks around Virginia up to date with what Mark Warner is working on in the Senate. Between the _Great American Outdoors Act_ passing in the House, and Mark introducing bills to support low-income and minority communities during the coronavirus pandemic and expand common sense gun reforms, it's been a busy week. Let's break it down.

**Here's what Mark is focused on right now:**
* This week, the House of Representatives passed the _Great American Outdoors Act_ with bi-partisan support. The bill includes full funding for the Land and Water Conservation Fund (LWCF) and will support **[100,000 jobs across the country (10,000 in Virginia alone!)](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbb4/53d9897e/546a42a0/1c8858c9/2652210990/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://heraldcourier.com/news/state/house-passes-sweeping-conservation-legislation-pushed-by-sen-mark-warner/article_79a07428-fbbb-51c6-9f34-1a6a42a42e39.html")** while providing the resources to address maintenance backlogs in our national parks. Mark has been working on this bill for the last three years; it passed in the Senate with bi-partisan support in June.
**-> Up next:** This bill heads to the President's desk for signature.

* **[Mark Warner introduced the _Jobs and Neighborhood Investment Act_](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbb4/53d9897e/546a42a0/1c8858c8/2652210990/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/senators-introduce-legislation-to-help-low-income-minority-communities-during-crisis/")** to help low-income and Black and brown communities that have been disproportionately impacted by the coronavirus pandemic withstand the outbreak and emerge even stronger. The bill includes investment in Community Development Financial Institutions (CDFIs) and Minority Depository Institutions (MDIs), a Neighborhood Loan Program to support small business lending to businesses serving low- and moderate-income and minority communities, and additional programs to strengthen MDIs and CDFIs, aimed at strengthening the relationship between these institutions and federal agencies like the U.S. Treasury.

* This week, Mark Warner and Senator Tim Kaine introduced the **["Virginia Plan" to expand the progress that Virginia has made on common sense gun reforms nationwide.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbb4/53d9897e/546a42a0/1c885837/2652210990/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://richmond.com/news/virginia/kaine-warner-push-for-virginias-new-gun-control-measures-to-become-federal-law/article_73f01fbb-1179-55b5-befb-f3a8fcdf7243.html")** Thanks to our General Assembly, the Commonwealth has taken action to end gun violence; it's time for Congress to act.

* Mark Warner called to **[continue unemployment benefits](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbb4/53d9897e/546a42a0/1c885836/2652210990/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wric.com/news/additional-600-in-unemployment-benefits-expires-this-week-congress-still-split-on-extension/")** as the coronavirus pandemic continues. Mark said that not extending these benefits while folks are still out of work due to the outbreak would be "a disaster."

* Mark Warner joined Senators Tim Kaine, Ron Wyden, and Jeff Merkley in **[co-sponsoring the _Preventing Authoritarian Tactics on America's Streets Act_](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbb4/53d9897e/546a42a0/1c885835/2652210990/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wavy.com/news/politics/warner-kaine-cosponsor-bill-to-block-deployment-of-federal-paramilitary-agents-in-us-cities/")** , following reports of unidentified officers deploying unjustified and unconstitutional intimidation tactics on protesters in Portland, Oregon. This bill would protect the constitutional rights of peaceful protesters.

* Mark **[called for Congress to be briefed by the F.B.I.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbb4/53d9897e/546a42a0/1c885834/2652210990/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.nytimes.com/2020/07/20/us/politics/congress-disinformation-biden-russia-ukraine.html")** on possible disinformation threats around the upcoming election. Mark is committed to ensuring our elections are fair and free of foreign interference, but to do that the Senate needs to work with all of the available information.

* This week, Mark Warner introduced a bill to **[prevent Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos or anyone in the Trump administration from denying funding to schools](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbb4/53d9897e/546a42a0/1c885833/2652210990/VEsO/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.13newsnow.com/article/news/nation-world/warner-pushes-bill-to-end-school-funding-threat/291-ea3d5951-1f88-416c-bc96-557bbc93022d")** who do not fully reopen in person in the fall. We can't afford to leave any of our children behind, but reopening too soon puts children, educators, and all those who work in our schools at risk. Reopening decisions should be made on the recommendations of public health professionals, local officials, and all available data.

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbb4/53d9897e/546a42a0/1c885832/2652210990/VEsP/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com")
Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbb4/53d9897e/546a42a0/1c885831/2652210990/VEsHBQ/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

Reopening decisions should be made on the recommendations of public health professionals, local officials, and all available data. Thank you for your support. -- Team Warner | "" Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

| | Friends -- I'm not going to mince words. Washington extremists were all over Tennessee yesterday trying to get their handpicked candidate installed in the Senate.

They know that my opponent will be a rubber stamp for more of the same. That's why they're doing all they can to get him elected.

I'm running to do what's right and I'll stand up to any party leader when their actions are wrong for Tennessee. Ads like this one, sharing my story of service across Tennessee, cost money. And we're relying on this grassroots network to keep it on the air. | [](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0d9/18d6a294/4c8911ca/26d7e9fe/274679993/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYWQifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200725?refcode=jme200725_ad_other&refcode2=107423")
---
[_**Chip in now and help keep it on the air ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0d9/18d6a294/4c8911ca/26d7e9fe/274679993/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYWQifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200725?refcode=jme200725_ad_other&refcode2=107423")
Folks, I never wanted to see my face on TV. I never dreamed of running for public office. But I love this country. So just like I did after we were attacked on 9/11, I'm stepping forward to serve in a crisis.

I'm not taking any corporate PAC money, so I need your help to keep this ad on the air. Our campaign continues to run on the tireless support of folks like you, and it always will. I'm running to serve people, not special interests, and that's the way it should be.
[_**Please chip in today to help me serve again and to share my message of service with more Tennesseans.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0d9/18d6a294/4c8911ca/26d7e9fe/274679993/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYWQifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200725?refcode=jme200725_ad_other&refcode2=107423")

In Service,
James

name: Hon. Ken Starr, My Faith Votes
subject: The next Supreme Court appointment
body:
Peter,
My name is Ken Starr. I had the honor of serving as the 39th Solicitor General of the United States as well as a judge for the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit Court, and most recently as legal counsel to the President of the United States.
I’m sending you this email because I have a firm belief in the important work My Faith Votes is doing to help people of faith be informed on critical issues and vote in every election.
My Faith Votes has an exceptional resource to help inform Christians on the Supreme Court’s rulings: The SCOTUS Watch. I encourage you to click on the buttons below to read their recent insightful summaries.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MN1h639DunxcuyH0fXDrefQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200725com01&n=1)
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MoOKp8byCt6r95jmf7qfUBQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200725com01&n=2)
Ahead of the November elections, it’s necessary to alert Christians to the vital importance of the upcoming presidential election, precipitated by the likely vacancy looming on the Supreme Court. The work of My Faith Votes to inform and equip Christians to vote is critical to protect our constitutionally guaranteed freedom.
I invite you to [**support their work today**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200725apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200725com01&n=3) for the sake of the next Supreme Court appointment.
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200725apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200725com01&n=4)
God bless you.
Honorable Ken Starr
Legal Counsel to President Donald Trump
Former U.S. Solicitor General
Former Judge, D.C. Circuit Court of Appeals

[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200725com01&n=5)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200725com01&n=6).

Laura Loomer

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nancy=20Mace?=
subject: Add your name: put the Lowcountry first
body:
My campaign is based on a simple idea — putting the Lowcountry first. I know that sounds easy, but it’s something that my opponent hasn’t managed to | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/6075066c3b05/how-we-flip-the-house-2088234?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=34a07c9a95&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=16716533f5&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| Friends,

_My campaign is based on a simple idea — putting the Lowcountry first. _ I know that sounds easy, but it’s something that my opponent hasn’t managed to do since he stepped foot on Capitol Hill two years ago.

He promised to be an independent voice for our district, but two years later it’s clear that he’s failed. He lied to our district about what he stands for, and it’s time that he pays the price.
---
| [Add your name and pledge to put the Lowcountry first](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=4104ba1f56&e=f1831b4ca2 "Add your name and pledge to put the Lowcountry first")
---
| I was born and raised in the Lowcountry. I worked my first job here, graduated from The Citadel, started a business, and raised my kids here.

I know our district inside and out. I know everything about the problems we face and the challenges we’ve overcome. And I would do anything for the people in our district.

**I wish I could say the same about my opponent, but he’s turned out to be just another career politician who says one thing to his constituents and does another when he gets to Washington. **

We can’t afford another two years of a representative who does nothing but follow marching orders from Nancy Pelosi.

We need a leader who puts the Lowcountry first, and I promise to be that leader.

Will you join me in pledging to put the Lowcountry first? If so, add your name using the button below.
---
| [Add your name and pledge to put the Lowcountry first](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=726cf8155b&e=f1831b4ca2 "Add your name and pledge to put the Lowcountry first")
---
| Thank you for joining me in pledging to put our district first.

Regards,

Nancy Mace

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: 100 days until election day
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Sq728cnnEjhGL49D5fBAHV1__MnDKF7HrP4O2GI0tKE=/eVOye2OYnHIYz6oSyPVkebl4-yim6nWsqpTt8LIQbwI=?refcode=0725201)
| | Friend, This weekend marks 100 days until the 2020 general election. If you find that shockingly close, you're not alone. This election is simultaneously the most important election of our lifetimes and also the strangest. If I learned anything from the most recent special session, it's that when we come together, great things can happen -- like passing the first step in our police accountability legislation. While at the same time, Republicans in the Minnesota House blocked progress on our local jobs & projects legislation that would have invested money in communities across our state. Who we elect matters. To truly be able to tackle the toughest issues facing our state, we need, now more than ever, to protect and expand our House DFL Majority. Today I am asking you to please follow us on social media and commit to volunteering to elect DFLers across the state. One of the most valuable resources we have is time and as of today, we're running dangerously short on it. [**Sign up to volunteer**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Sq728cnnEjhGL49D5fBAHV1__MnDKF7HrP4O2GI0tKE=/uziySsFxpB7yRsTKPTkFoP5t-9uea9G3JF2QpHowTxI=?usp=sf_link) [**Like us on Facebook**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Sq728cnnEjhGL49D5fBAHV1__MnDKF7HrP4O2GI0tKE=/lncCSIksWIIhYUu9NoNzYY-XxOoFMLunIuz4Kfflrss=) [**Learn more about our candidates**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Sq728cnnEjhGL49D5fBAHV1__MnDKF7HrP4O2GI0tKE=/QZkHAOjKOj_i31jOw6UKAM0gjvH8fYWrvvfED1RkvGQ=) I know that in the next 100 days, I will commit myself to doing everything I can to elect DFLers up and down the ballot. Together we can build a better future for all Minnesotans, no exceptions. Will you join us? Thank you, **Melissa Hortman** Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Sq728cnnEjhGL49D5fBAHV1__MnDKF7HrP4O2GI0tKE=/eVOye2OYnHIYz6oSyPVkebl4-yim6nWsqpTt8LIQbwI=?refcode=0725201)
---

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: School Edition: Hear What Pediatricians Have to Say
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
As we look toward reopening schools, Rhode Island is putting public health first and relying on facts and science to make the best decisions for the mental, physical, and intellectual needs of our students. We know that students benefit enormously from in-person learning, and our job is to make sure it can happen safely. I know people are scared, and there's a lot of misinformation out there. As we've done all along, we're going to be open and transparent, share our thinking with you every day, and rely on the advice of experts. Our COVID-19 response can only work if we all work together, so I want you to hear the same advice I'm hearing at every step of the process. Commissioner Angelica Infante-Green and I will be holding weekly forums on my Facebook page every Thursday at 3 p.m. to talk with experts about our plan to reopen Rhode Island's schools. You can watch this week's forum [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f-8Qm3gJclhJsAmYJGazwu4EnEeXKog1yznqA9WqZ2rQ4IFpja3VYrrrSKFrIoax80-cWY4bB3AyE5c0sR1JhYblQfo-dRLWwOgn6XaQ1xZKsFP-L9Cy7DXpbnFT_4mQrt-yUu2h1bVb_eSWSJx8aFRm6UCXOY9Tmk07F_pPznmCFbPWoNWhATejAMJ7kuPEGOQvqXNCF57RFZ1gwlSuHiJe7rBp3x6U-eOeHPY1Fxc=&c=3gB4ExWOrrCJ0pepdHZn2CEPQK39CWcuJtQW_KlEh7ibH60dJnYuBA==&ch=JSllsPyMyzYKMKpsBZXQbTZLmIh9Xfv_mfPnMiTkC749Xq8KPmCNgw==).
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f-8Qm3gJclhJsAmYJGazwu4EnEeXKog1yznqA9WqZ2rQ4IFpja3VYrrrSKFrIoax80-cWY4bB3AyE5c0sR1JhYblQfo-dRLWwOgn6XaQ1xZKsFP-L9Cy7DXpbnFT_4mQrt-yUu2h1bVb_eSWSJx8aFRm6UCXOY9Tmk07F_pPznmCFbPWoNWhATejAMJ7kuPEGOQvqXNCF57RFZ1gwlSuHiJe7rBp3x6U-eOeHPY1Fxc=&c=3gB4ExWOrrCJ0pepdHZn2CEPQK39CWcuJtQW_KlEh7ibH60dJnYuBA==&ch=JSllsPyMyzYKMKpsBZXQbTZLmIh9Xfv_mfPnMiTkC749Xq8KPmCNgw==)
---
| This week, we were joined by two prominent Rhode Island pediatricians: Dr. Jim McDonald from the Department of Health, who many of you may recognize from my COVID-19 press briefings, and Dr. Elizabeth Lange, the former President of the RI Chapter of the American Academy of Pediatrics. We had a wide ranging discussion about the ways in which this virus impacts young people, the impacts of in-person learning on students' development, the importance of socal, mental, physical, and nutritional health. I know that the future is uncertain, but together, we will choose the safest path for our students, teachers, and parents.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f-8Qm3gJclhJsAmYJGazwu4EnEeXKog1yznqA9WqZ2rQ4IFpja3VYnGEKXaUeL3nPTLNkk4sz48sETbvfAYhMJlxSmWX5kcuYZXucRI94ywMkz8TRM6D1kkI66vJfZr4oNHWJO_hBAVftMCbl8GzPuYveAMkA3XJ3VmteyAM0Nb6wRf0b0q7QlIVCudP-lgEkpfbEpm5AsM=&c=3gB4ExWOrrCJ0pepdHZn2CEPQK39CWcuJtQW_KlEh7ibH60dJnYuBA==&ch=JSllsPyMyzYKMKpsBZXQbTZLmIh9Xfv_mfPnMiTkC749Xq8KPmCNgw==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f-8Qm3gJclhJsAmYJGazwu4EnEeXKog1yznqA9WqZ2rQ4IFpja3VYnGEKXaUeL3nPTLNkk4sz48sETbvfAYhMJlxSmWX5kcuYZXucRI94ywMkz8TRM6D1kkI66vJfZr4oNHWJO_hBAVftMCbl8GzPuYveAMkA3XJ3VmteyAM0Nb6wRf0b0q7QlIVCudP-lgEkpfbEpm5AsM=&c=3gB4ExWOrrCJ0pepdHZn2CEPQK39CWcuJtQW_KlEh7ibH60dJnYuBA==&ch=JSllsPyMyzYKMKpsBZXQbTZLmIh9Xfv_mfPnMiTkC749Xq8KPmCNgw==).
---
| P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f-8Qm3gJclhJsAmYJGazwu4EnEeXKog1yznqA9WqZ2rQ4IFpja3VYrrrSKFrIoaxoR2sqh6majypND2sYQBCWVpaWjrBsItniBjQ0SeFjGDN-rD251D6_CXUkwB6MG2BpUCEiyiamwtSwZGFQHaQ7GN4WZiYUNCg-5IP2lqMeDtz3IjKgliRNht3mwP6NQnIlzNs05e5y4HovEZzyhl_eaLp2ob6yxseMJ4ogelfiJACHkYAOba2ArJgRlIds9UKHySAue_U6ApPOEfLA_udazyG5LOajPQ0KoiM8vMqI2ya39dnjy2_40x7K6shDU01Volsw8VsseI=&c=3gB4ExWOrrCJ0pepdHZn2CEPQK39CWcuJtQW_KlEh7ibH60dJnYuBA==&ch=JSllsPyMyzYKMKpsBZXQbTZLmIh9Xfv_mfPnMiTkC749Xq8KPmCNgw==).

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: Up for grabs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

Texas is
the biggest battleground state in the union. Let’s talk numbers:

* 9 -- the number of seats we need to flip the State House
* 36 -- the number of seats that could help us hold or expand our
majority in the House of Representatives
* 38 -- the number of electoral college votes at stake that would seal
the deal for Joe Biden in November

You won’t find more numbers up for grabs in any other state. That’s why
we’re asking people inside and outside of Texas to volunteer with Powered
By People to help us make 2020 the historic year when we flip Texas
completely.

This week Beto is hosting two important phone banks. Our calls from
volunteer-to-voter are the best way for us to flip Texas in 2020. But we
can’t dial through millions of Texans without more volunteers like you.
Can you join Beto and our team for a phone bank on Monday or Wednesday?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34386?source=ema20200725-98871&t=1001&akid=98871%2E444211%2EnBDEBq ]Monday Virtual Phone Bank with Beto
July 27 at 6:30pm Central Time

subject: Farmers can't trust Rita Hart
body:
| | | |
---
| Team,

ICYMI, Rita Hart recently [endorsed radical legislation](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=364968acf7&e=16fac31a0f) proposed by coastal democrat Senators Cory Booker and Elizabeth Warren. The bill she supports is called the "Farm Systems Reform Act" which would place a limit on livestock production, shut down thousands of Iowa farms and surrender control of Iowa farms to Washington bureaucrats.

Rita Hart's position on this bill is unacceptable She is selling out Iowa farmers and producers to the radical left and is locking arms with far-left organizations in their support for this legislation

Lt. Colonel Mariannette Miller-Meeks is not afraid to stand up to the radical left and fight this legislation. Farmers can count on Mariannette to have their back!

Our fundraising deadline is Friday at midnight, will you chip in to fight Rita Hart's radical agenda? [Click here today to contribute $10, $20, $30, $40 or $50 to help us win this seat back in November.](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=982eacd41f&e=16fac31a0f)

Thank you for your support!

Austin Harris
Campaign Manager

Our race to defeat Sen. Cornyn is heating up, Peter. Since winning the runoff just over ten days ago, our momentum has skyrocketed!

We've seen a surge of online grassroots donations -- more than $400,00 raised online, with 88% of donations under $100! New polling is terrifying Sen. Cornyn's team, showing victory within our reach! Plus _Inside Elections_ upgraded this race in MJ's favor!

But if we're going to beat Sen. Cornyn and flip Texas, we can't let up. Flipping Texas isn't going to be easy, and that's why we need as many people as possible to pull together and help us out. **[Can we count on you?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ecb/7f51f7bc/405c119e/4ef64d9b/759092734/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3ODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200725.2nd__1789__&amount=10")**

|

subject: Mayberry on the issues: Ending Illegal Immigration
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Matt Mayberry for Congress
body:
| |

| Mayberry on the Issues: Ending Illegal Immigration
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Friends, Far too many substance-less political campaigns like to talk in generic platitudes about the issues. Not me! I want to give you in depth plans and statements about where I stand. I hope my "on the issues" emails give you more information about what I will do as your Congressman. You can visit my [issues section](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDczMjA5NDQ2MjU4NzEwMDgxJmM9azJoMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNzY1NDg2MTAmZD1lN3g4YTV2.GByoc7r373w5wHBRlWGn0O_b9Ujh_pFeBQiGMBchKi0) for more, or call me directly on my personal cell phone at [603-969-7077](tel:603-969-7077) to discuss anything important to you! Thank you, - Matt
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
|
### **ENDING ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION**
Now more than ever, immigration has become one of our nation’s top concerns. Every year, hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants unlawfully cross over our borders. However, there are those who chose to try to immigrate the right way, through the legal application process, and wait their turn, often for years. Unimpeded illegal immigration across our national border is a threat to national security, a threat to our economy, and as we have learned this year, a threat to public health. The COVID-19 crisis has shown us how quickly a global virus can spread if unchecked. The virus was carried to our country from Asia and Europe before spreading in our communities. While viruses do not stop at borders, their carriers can be. It is crucial to protecting the health and wellbeing of our citizens that we know who is coming into our country, and what they may be bringing with them.
* First and foremost, we need to complete President Trump’s wall on our Southern Border. Stopping the influx of drugs and potentially dangerous people into our country needs to be the focus of our immigration policy before any other measures can be taken. We need to dig the walls deeper to prevents tunnels from being created and using sensors and drone technology to patrol the open desert spaces that span hundreds of miles;
* We need to end chain migration;
* We need to stop “Sanctuary Cities” by taking away all Federal Funding from municipalities that choose use the designation. As I wrote in an Op-Ed earlier this year, municipalities do not get to pick and choose which immigration laws they want to enforce. Sanctuary cities are dangerous to all of us and should not receive one penny from the Federal Government.

name: Georgia Senate Update via Team Ossoff
subject: 🔵Friend, Georgia is going blue in 2020🔵
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
If Jon Ossoff and Rev. Warnock both win in Georgia ... |
---
Friend -- **The path to a Democratic Senate runs through Georgia.**

**We have the opportunity to flip TWO U.S. Senate seats -- and both races are DEAD HEATS!**

**Democrats Jon Ossoff and Reverend Raphael Warnock are running against two of the MOST CORRUPT Senators in the country.**

Jon's general election opponent, David Perdue, was trading medical stocks in January and February while publicly downplaying the coronavirus pandemic.

And in the special election for Georgia's second seat, Rev. Warnock is taking on Kelly Loeffler ... who, after the Senate was briefed on the coronavirus in January, WAS ALSO TRADING STOCKS HEAVILY.

**Instead of alerting the people of Georgia to the severity of the impending COVID-19 pandemic, both Perdue and Loeffler decided to line their own pockets.**

**Friend, this November we have the opportunity to replace these corrupt, self-serving Republican Senators with Democrats Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock, who will put Georgians ahead of their own financial interests.**

_**And if they win here, Democrats will take back the Senate!**_

**[Right now, will you split a donation between Jon and Rev. Warnock to give Democrats a U.S. Senate majority?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2122/5b2c1286/3df2968f/25f173d5/237619201/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_25_jo_rw?refcode=em_2020_07_25_jo_rw")**

2020 is the year Georgia goes blue.

Jon Ossoff and Rev. Warnock both have surging campaigns and are leading their incumbent Republican opponents.

And Donald Trump is TRAILING Joe Biden in a state Trump won big in 2016.

**Obviously, Republicans are panicking.**

_They've committed TENS of MILLION of DOLLARS to protect these seats._

_Trump is already running ads here and even visited Georgia two weeks ago -- a sure sign the White House knows Georgia is slipping away._

And Democratic voters are engaged.

**In the June Primary, Georgia Democrats SHATTERED state turnout records, far exceeding Republican vote totals.**

**_Over 750,000_ new voters have registered in the last two years since Stacey Abrams came within _only 55,000 votes_ of winning the governor's race.**

Georgia is demanding leaders like Jon Ossoff and Rev. Warnock, who will put the public interest ahead of their own and fight for the Georgia families David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler have ignored and neglected.

**In November, Georgians will deliver a resounding call for change at the ballot box and deliver TWO U.S. Senate victories.**

**[So please, split a $10 donation between Democratic Senate candidates Jon Ossoff and Rev. Raphael Warnock in 2020's top battleground state.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2122/5b2c1286/3df2968f/25f173db/237619201/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_25_jo_rw?refcode=em_2020_07_25_jo_rw&amount=10&amounts=10,20,50,100,250,500,1000")**

clean_body: If Jon Ossoff and Rev. Warnock both win in Georgia ... | Friend -- The path to a Democratic Senate runs through Georgia. We have the opportunity to flip TWO U.S. Senate seats -- and both races are DEAD HEATS! Democrats Jon Ossoff and Reverend Raphael Warnock are running against two of the MOST CORRUPT Senators in the country. Jon's general election opponent, David Perdue, was trading medical stocks in January and February while publicly downplaying the coronavirus pandemic. And in the special election for Georgia's second seat, Rev. Warnock is taking on Kelly Loeffler ... who, after the Senate was briefed on the coronavirus in January, WAS ALSO TRADING STOCKS HEAVILY. Instead of alerting the people of Georgia to the severity of the impending COVID-19 pandemic, both Perdue and Loeffler decided to line their own pockets. Friend, this November we have the opportunity to replace these corrupt, self-serving Republican Senators with Democrats Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock, who will put Georgians ahead of their own financial interests. And if they win here, Democrats will take back the Senate! "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" 2020 is the year Georgia goes blue. Jon Ossoff and Rev. Warnock both have surging campaigns and are leading their incumbent Republican opponents. And Donald Trump is TRAILING Joe Biden in a state Trump won big in 2016. Obviously, Republicans are panicking. They've committed TENS of MILLION of DOLLARS to protect these seats. Trump is already running ads here and even visited Georgia two weeks ago -- a sure sign the White House knows Georgia is slipping away. And Democratic voters are engaged. In the June Primary, Georgia Democrats SHATTERED state turnout records, far exceeding Republican vote totals. Over 750,000 new voters have registered in the last two years since Stacey Abrams came within only 55,000 votes of winning the governor's race. Georgia is demanding leaders like Jon Ossoff and Rev. Warnock, who will put the public interest ahead of their own and fight for the Georgia families David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler have ignored and neglected. name: Pepper & Boomer
subject: Shhhh! Don’t tell our moms we stole the computer!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
We know it may seem crazy to receive an email from two dogs, but it's 2020, anything goes, right? You see, both of our moms are in the middle of some pretty tough campaigns, and they need our help to ensure they can stay fighting for our values.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNDE3MzQS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTk5NTA1MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,
You've probably heard of Senator Susan Collins and Senator Martha McSally, but to us, we just call them MOM!

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNDE3MzQS1&kn=19&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTk5NTA1MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
We are Pepper Collins and Boomer McSally, and we are writing to you today to ask for treats. Just kidding!! [**We are writing to you today to ask if you could help us support our moms.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNDE3MzQS1&kn=18&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTk5NTA1MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

---
You see, both of our moms are in the middle of some pretty tough campaigns, and they need our help to ensure they can stay fighting for our values. And no we don't mean fighting for unlimited treats, _but_ , that would be pretty delicious.
Even though we live far apart from each other, our moms have a lot in common. They are both hardworking, determined fighters who work every single day to ensure Americans (and their pets!) are safe and successful. Our moms don't toe the party line, they vote based on the values and beliefs of the people they serve. They don't put up with the bickering and games of Washington DC; in fact, the only games they like are catch and fetch with us!
[**And, as we mentioned, they are both in really tough races right now and need all hands or paws on deck! So if you could join us in supporting our moms, Susan and Martha, we would really appreciate it.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNDE3MzQS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTk5NTA1MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
**When you click on this button you 'll be taken to a page where you can donate to both of our moms. **
[🐾 DONATE TO MARTHA & SUSAN >>> ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNDE3MzQS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTk5NTA1MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
We know it may seem crazy to receive an email from two dogs, but it's 2020, anything goes, right?
LOL, (Lots of Licks),
Pepper Collins & Boomer McSally
[🐾 DONATE TO MARTHA & SUSAN >>> ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNDE3MzQS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTk5NTA1MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[And that's why we are so hopeful you will jump in today and make a contribution of whatever you can afford! It will really make a difference. ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNDE3MzQS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTk5NTA1MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

name: Joseph R. Biden Jr.
subject: You have to stand up and act, Derek​
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
My mom and dad taught me that if you see injustice, you have to stand up and act. | |
---
My mom and dad taught me that if you see injustice, you have to stand up and act, Derek. That’s why I became a public defender at age 26. It’s why I ran for county council. And when I won, I railed against housing discrimination. And it’s why, when I became a U.S. Senator, I fought relentlessly for voting rights and civil rights. And it is why I was so proud to serve by President Obama’s side for eight years to work to push our nation to more fully live up to its founding values, and to lead our country out of an economic crisis, and extend health coverage to tens of millions of Americans. There’s never been a more important time in our history to fight against injustice, Derek. It’s going to take more than just winning back the White House to make that possible, and the time our party has to help Democratic campaigns at every level is running out quickly. That's why I am about to ask you to split your first ever donation between my campaign and the DNC. We have a big task on our hands this year, and we have to act. **If you’re able, please split a $10 donation between my campaign for president and our party today.**

** ** **** ** Healing our nation will take a president -- and a House and Senate -- that stands up to injustice. Not a president who fans the flames of fear and hatred to benefit himself and his Republican allies. **Here’s the thing though, Derek: Donald Trump and his allies had a three-and-a-half-year head start. He launched his reelection campaign on day one and has been raising money ever since -- in fact, he has $295 million cash-on-hand as of the end of June.** This team has been doing a heck of a job catching up, but right now, we need to dig deeper if we’re going to overcome their advantage once and for all. You know I hate asking for money, but the only way that we’re going to be able to keep our majority in the House, flip the Senate, and win the White House this year is if we give this our all. We’ve only got one shot at this, so I have to ask: **[Will you make your first $10 donation split between my campaign and the Democratic National Committee today? clean_body: My mom and dad taught me that if you see injustice, you have to stand up and act. | | My mom and dad taught me that if you see injustice, you have to stand up and act, Derek. That’s why I became a public defender at age 26. It’s why I ran for county council. And when I won, I railed against housing discrimination. And it’s why, when I became a U.S. Senator, I fought relentlessly for voting rights and civil rights. And it is why I was so proud to serve by President Obama’s side for eight years to work to push our nation to more fully live up to its founding values, and to lead our country out of an economic crisis, and extend health coverage to tens of millions of Americans. There’s never been a more important time in our history to fight against injustice, Derek. It’s going to take more than just winning back the White House to make that possible, and the time our party has to help Democratic campaigns at every level is running out quickly. That's why I am about to ask you to split your first ever donation between my campaign and the DNC. We have a big task on our hands this year, and we have to act. If you’re able, please split a $10 donation between my campaign for president and our party today. Healing our nation will take a president -- and a House and Senate -- that stands up to injustice. Not a president who fans the flames of fear and hatred to benefit himself and his Republican allies. Here’s the thing though, Derek: Donald Trump and his allies had a three-and-a-half-year head start. He launched his reelection campaign on day one and has been raising money ever since -- in fact, he has $295 million cash-on-hand as of the end of June. This team has been doing a heck of a job catching up, but right now, we need to dig deeper if we’re going to overcome their advantage once and for all. You know I hate asking for money, but the only way that we’re going to be able to keep our majority in the House, flip the Senate, and win the White House this year is if we give this our all. We’ve only got one shot at this, so I have to ask: Keep the faith, Joe Joe Biden

name: Joe Biden 2020
subject: Can you chip in your first $5 to keep up our momentum in these final 100 days?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
There's a lot we need to accomplish, and it's going to be expensive. |
---
Peter, July has been a month of growth for Team Joe:

**FIRST:** We announced that we outraised Trump and the Republicans for a second month in a row, and we made a _significant_ dent in their cash-on-hand advantage.

**THEN:** We were able to capitalize on that surge in grassroots donations to dramatically increase our advertising budget and reach even more undecided voters in battleground states across the country.

**BUT NOW:** We're about to reach a critical milestone for this campaign tomorrow: _just 100 days_ until Election Day. And we need to pick up the momentum even more to make sure we're prepared for this final phase of the general election.

That means getting our new hires in place across the country and building out new digital tools to accomplish a voter outreach program that's never been done before at this scale under these socially distant circumstances. We have to make ad buys into expensive media markets to reach undecided voters we wouldn't normally reach.

There's a lot we need to accomplish, _and it 's going to be expensive._

[**That 's why we've set a 100 Days goal.**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.25_B3_FTN-100days_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.25_B3_FTN-100days_X__F1_S2_C1__full") To not only celebrate this huge milestone for our campaign, but also to keep the pressure on for fundraising.

[**We 're still counting on more grassroots supporters chipping in for the first time by tomorrow to make sure we meet our goal.**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.25_B3_FTN-100days_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.25_B3_FTN-100days_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

clean_body: There's a lot we need to accomplish, and it's going to be expensive. | Peter, July has been a month of growth for Team Joe: FIRST: We announced that we outraised Trump and the Republicans for a second month in a row, and we made a significant dent in their cash-on-hand advantage. THEN: We were able to capitalize on that surge in grassroots donations to dramatically increase our advertising budget and reach even more undecided voters in battleground states across the country. BUT NOW: We're about to reach a critical milestone for this campaign tomorrow: just 100 days until Election Day. And we need to pick up the momentum even more to make sure we're prepared for this final phase of the general election. That means getting our new hires in place across the country and building out new digital tools to accomplish a voter outreach program that's never been done before at this scale under these socially distant circumstances. We have to make ad buys into expensive media markets to reach undecided voters we wouldn't normally reach. There's a lot we need to accomplish, and it 's going to be expensive. "" To not only celebrate this huge milestone for our campaign, but also to keep the pressure on for fundraising. name: Blue Georgia
subject: Stacey Abrams is ALL IN with Rev. Warnock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
If you believe in the future we're fighting for, we need you to answer just one question before 11:59 p.m. tonight, but we're still missing your response:
| | | Have you heard, friend?
---
**Democratic powerhouse Stacey Abrams confirms that Georgia is the NUMBER ONE battleground state in 2020!**
When Stacey ran for governor back in 2018, the strength of her grassroots movement was _undeniable_. It was a wake-up call for Democrats across this country: Georgia was winnable _ _ and ready for change.

But the Republicans' systematic voter suppression stripped tens of thousands of people of their right to vote - and history will repeat itself unless we elect a leader who's committed to representing all Georgians, not just a lucky few.
That's why Stacey is ALL IN with Reverend Warnock in this fight to flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate for Democrats and elect the first Black senator this state has _ _ ever seen. But we won't win without you, friend.

**If you believe in the future we're fighting for - one in which every single voice deserves to be heard - we need you to ****answer just one question before 11:59 p.m. tonight, but we're still missing your response:**

name: Team Joe
subject: [You're Invited] Pennsylvania "Organizing and Grace" Event with Debra Messing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Join us! |
---
Peter -- On Sunday, July 26, actor Debra Messing, along with leaders across the Keystone State, will host organizing events for Pennsylvania for Biden's "100 Days of Action" Weekend of Action. The Weekend of Action will commemorate 100 days away from the November election on Sunday when Pennsylvania makes Donald Trump a one-term president.

Over 1,500 Pennsylvanians have signed up to take action in the Pennsylvania for Biden "100 Days of Action" Weekend of Action. The Weekend will consist of over 60 house parties and other organizing events held virtually across the Commonwealth. **[Click below to RSVP and receive a Zoom registration link:](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b92b/1cd0ac28/1741e29f8/357de337/4109598401/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.mobilize.us/joebiden/event/292273/?source=JB_EM_EV_2020.07.25_B8_Org -Grace_X__F1_S1_C1_PA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_EV_2020.07.25_B8_Org -Grace_X__F1_S1_C1_PA")** | | **Pennsylvania "Organizing and Grace" Event with Debra Messing** Sunday, July 26, 2020
3:00 PM EDT RSVP below for a link to the virtual event!
---
| [**RSVP now >>**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b92b/1cd0ac28/1741e29f8/357de337/4109598401/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.mobilize.us/joebiden/event/292273/?source=JB_EM_EV_2020.07.25_B8_Org -Grace_X__F1_S1_C1_PA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_EV_2020.07.25_B8_Org -Grace_X__F1_S1_C1_PA")
---
Once you've RSVP'd, forward this to 3 friends to ensure they get involved too!
See you online!

Team Joe
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b92b/1cd0ac28/1741e29f8/357de336/4109598401/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b92b/1cd0ac28/1741e29f8/357de334/4109598401/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b92b/1cd0ac28/1741e29f8/357de333/4109598401/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b92b/1cd0ac28/1741e29f8/357de332/4109598401/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b92b/1cd0ac28/1741e29f8/357de331/4109598401/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b92b/1cd0ac28/1741e29f8/357de32e/4109598401/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b92b/1cd0ac28/1741e29f8/357de32d/4109598401/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b92b/1cd0ac28/1741e29f8/357de32b/4109598401/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b92b/1cd0ac28/1741e29f8/357de328/4109598401/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b92b/1cd0ac28/1741e29f8/357de327/4109598401/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b92b/1cd0ac28/1741e29f8/357de32d/4109598401/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b92b/1cd0ac28/1741e29f8/357de324/4109598401/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b92b/1cd0ac28/1741e29f8/357de32b/4109598401/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b92b/1cd0ac28/1741e29f8/357de322/4109598401/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: ACTION NEEDED (via protectvoting.org)
subject: We're seeing fascism in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0395/72412298/4bdf7518/610647b0/2765854437/VEsH/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200725_FederalAgent_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200725_FederalAgent_U2_X2")

| | Every Democrat must ACT now -- our democracy is on the line today. What we are seeing unfold in Portland is completely unacceptable. Federal agents invading the city, grabbing people off the streets, and putting them into unmarked vehicles -- _this is fascism at its finest._ **And if it can happen in Portland -- it can happen ANYWHERE in America.** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0395/72412298/4bdf7518/610647b3/2765854437/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200725_FederalAgent_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200725_FederalAgent_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200725_FederalAgent_U2_X2") Our President's power is _OUT OF CONTROL_. _He must be stopped NOW!_ **We 're calling on Congress to act by blocking President Trump from sending these agents into cities to attack and kidnap protestors. [Will you join 12,000 of our other supporters in calling on Congress to block the President's actions now?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0395/72412298/4bdf7518/610647b2/2765854437/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200725_FederalAgent_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Will+you+join+12000+of+our+other+support&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200725_FederalAgent_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200725_FederalAgent_U2_X2")** | | | [Call on Congress to Block Trump NOW! >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0395/72412298/4bdf7518/610647b5/2765854437/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200725_FederalAgent_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Call+on+Congress+to+Block+Trump+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200725_FederalAgent_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200725_FederalAgent_U2_X2")
---
This is the United States of America -- a nation founded on democratic principles, like the right to protest and the right to speak truth to power.
_If our President is able to send to federal agents to kidnap his adversaries -- we are no longer a democracy._**Point blank.**
**We 're joining thousands of concerned Americans calling on Congress to stop President Trump's deployment of federal agents into our communities. **_Every Democrat must ACT now -- our democracy is on the line today._
[**Will you join us in demanding Congress act now to prevent the President from abusing his office to silence his vocal opposition?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0395/72412298/4bdf7518/610647b4/2765854437/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200725_FederalAgent_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Will+you+join+us+in+demanding+Congress+a&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200725_FederalAgent_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200725_FederalAgent_U2_X2")

name: Defeat Senator Cornyn
subject: Sen. Cornyn is trying to keep Texas in the past
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
MJ Hegar is going to move us forward.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ede/7f51f7bc/4053f8ce/4ef64e29/3753750641/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ede/7f51f7bc/4053f8ce/4ef64e28/3753750641/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?refcode=email_20200725.3nd__1739__&amount=10")
---
**Sen. Cornyn is stuck in the past,** Peter, and he's trying to drag Texas back with him.
* **He 's fought against real immigration reform** for his entire 18-year career in the Senate.
* Ever since the Affordable Care Act passed in 2010, he's been **" repeal's top salesman,"** voting 20 times to gut it.
* He continues to **block gun safety reforms** that could save Texans' lives, opting instead to take money from the NRA.
* **He supports Mitch McConnell,** who won't even allow a vote on a bill that would curb the skyrocketing cost of prescription drugs!

**It 's no wonder Sen. Cornyn's approval rating is a dismal 29%. MJ can defeat him in November and flip Texas and the Senate -- but we need YOU to make it happen. [Pitch in now!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ede/7f51f7bc/4053f8ce/4ef64e28/3753750641/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?refcode=email_20200725.3nd__1739__&amount=10")**
\-- Team MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ede/7f51f7bc/4053f8ce/4ef64e28/3753750641/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postrunoffb?refcode=email_20200725.3nd__1739__&amount=10")
